categories.name: 📊 Resumo Geral
categories.description: Visão consolidada de todas as operações

queries.title: Resumo - Grupo SEB (YTD Outubro)
queries.query:
WITH 
-- ===== CTEs para Resultado 2024 (10M24 R) =====
alunos_por_mes_2024 AS (
  -- Calcular total de alunos por Vertical e por Mês (março a outubro) - 2024
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    month(Data_Transacao) as mes,
    sum(case when Origem = 'Alunos' and skclasspnl = '400000000' then Valor else 0 end) as total_alunos_mes
  FROM financeiro.prd.mv_f_apresentacao
  WHERE year(Data_Transacao) = year(current_date) - 1
    AND month(Data_Transacao) BETWEEN 3 AND 10
  GROUP BY Vertical, month(Data_Transacao)
),
media_alunos_2024 AS (
  -- Média dos totais mensais por Vertical (arredondado para inteiro) - 2024
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    round(avg(total_alunos_mes), 0) as Alunos
  FROM alunos_por_mes_2024
  GROUP BY Vertical
),
rol_resultado_2024 AS (
  -- ROL e Resultado: soma acumulada de janeiro a outubro (arredondado para inteiro, multiplicado por -1 para inverter sinal) - 2024
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    round(sum(case when Origem in ('Resultado', 'Ajustes') and ROL = 1 then Valor else 0 end) * -1, 0) as ROL,
    round(sum(case when Origem in ('Resultado', 'Ajustes') and lower(Ebitda) = 'sim' and lower(Recorrente) = 'sim' then Valor else 0 end) * -1, 0) as Resultado
  FROM financeiro.prd.mv_f_apresentacao
  WHERE year(Data_Transacao) = year(current_date) - 1
    AND month(Data_Transacao) BETWEEN 1 AND 10
  GROUP BY Vertical
),
base_data_2024 AS (
  SELECT
    ma.Vertical,
    ma.Alunos as Alunos_2024,
    rf.ROL as ROL_2024,
    rf.Resultado as Resultado_2024
  FROM media_alunos_2024 ma
  LEFT JOIN rol_resultado_2024 rf ON ma.Vertical = rf.Vertical
),
-- ===== CTEs para Forecast (10M25 F) =====
alunos_por_mes_forecast AS (
  -- Calcular total de alunos por Vertical e por Mês (março a outubro) - Forecast
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    month(Data_Transacao) as mes,
    sum(case when Origem = 'Forecast' and skclasspnl = '400000000' then Valor else 0 end) as total_alunos_mes
  FROM financeiro.prd.mv_f_apresentacao
  WHERE year(Data_Transacao) = 2025
    AND month(Data_Transacao) BETWEEN 3 AND 10
  GROUP BY Vertical, month(Data_Transacao)
),
media_alunos_forecast AS (
  -- Média dos totais mensais por Vertical (arredondado para inteiro) - Forecast
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    round(avg(total_alunos_mes), 0) as Alunos
  FROM alunos_por_mes_forecast
  GROUP BY Vertical
),
rol_forecast AS (
  -- ROL e Forecast: soma acumulada de janeiro a outubro (arredondado para inteiro, multiplicado por -1 para inverter sinal)
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    round(sum(case when Origem = 'Forecast' and ROL = 1 then Valor else 0 end) * -1, 0) as ROL,
    round(sum(case when Origem = 'Forecast' and lower(Ebitda) = 'sim' and lower(Recorrente) = 'sim' then Valor else 0 end) * -1, 0) as Forecast
  FROM financeiro.prd.mv_f_apresentacao
  WHERE year(Data_Transacao) = 2025
    AND month(Data_Transacao) BETWEEN 1 AND 10
  GROUP BY Vertical
),
base_data_forecast AS (
  SELECT
    ma.Vertical,
    ma.Alunos as Alunos_F,
    rf.ROL as ROL_F,
    rf.Forecast as Forecast_F
  FROM media_alunos_forecast ma
  LEFT JOIN rol_forecast rf ON ma.Vertical = rf.Vertical
),
-- ===== CTEs para Resultado (10M25 R) =====
alunos_por_mes_resultado AS (
  -- Calcular total de alunos por Vertical e por Mês (março a outubro) - Resultado
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    month(Data_Transacao) as mes,
    sum(case when Origem = 'Alunos' and skclasspnl = '400000000' then Valor else 0 end) as total_alunos_mes
  FROM financeiro.prd.mv_f_apresentacao
  WHERE year(Data_Transacao) = 2025
    AND month(Data_Transacao) BETWEEN 3 AND 10
  GROUP BY Vertical, month(Data_Transacao)
),
media_alunos_resultado AS (
  -- Média dos totais mensais por Vertical (arredondado para inteiro) - Resultado
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    round(avg(total_alunos_mes), 0) as Alunos
  FROM alunos_por_mes_resultado
  GROUP BY Vertical
),
rol_resultado AS (
  -- ROL e Resultado: soma acumulada de janeiro a outubro (arredondado para inteiro, multiplicado por -1 para inverter sinal)
  SELECT
    Vertical,
    round(sum(case when Origem in ('Resultado', 'Ajustes') and ROL = 1 then Valor else 0 end) * -1, 0) as ROL,
    round(sum(case when Origem in ('Resultado', 'Ajustes') and lower(Ebitda) = 'sim' and lower(Recorrente) = 'sim' then Valor else 0 end) * -1, 0) as Resultado
  FROM financeiro.prd.mv_f_apresentacao
  WHERE year(Data_Transacao) = 2025
    AND month(Data_Transacao) BETWEEN 1 AND 10
  GROUP BY Vertical
),
base_data_resultado AS (
  SELECT
    ma.Vertical,
    ma.Alunos as Alunos_R,
    rf.ROL as ROL_R,
    rf.Resultado as Resultado_R
  FROM media_alunos_resultado ma
  LEFT JOIN rol_resultado rf ON ma.Vertical = rf.Vertical
),
-- ===== Lista única de todas as Verticais =====
all_verticals AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT Vertical FROM base_data_2024
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT Vertical FROM base_data_forecast
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT Vertical FROM base_data_resultado
),
-- ===== JOIN de 2024, Forecast e Resultado =====
base_data AS (
  SELECT
    av.Vertical,
    b24.Alunos_2024,
    b24.ROL_2024,
    b24.Resultado_2024,
    bf.Alunos_F,
    bf.ROL_F,
    bf.Forecast_F,
    br.Alunos_R,
    br.ROL_R,
    br.Resultado_R
  FROM all_verticals av
  LEFT JOIN base_data_2024 b24 ON av.Vertical = b24.Vertical
  LEFT JOIN base_data_forecast bf ON av.Vertical = bf.Vertical
  LEFT JOIN base_data_resultado br ON av.Vertical = br.Vertical
)

-- ===== SELECTs com 12 colunas (ordem: 10M24 R → 10M25 F → 10M25 R) =====
-- Verticais individuais: Premium e Vanguarda
SELECT 
  Vertical,
  round(Alunos_2024, 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(ROL_2024, 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(Resultado_2024, 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when ROL_2024 = 0 or ROL_2024 is null then null else round(Resultado_2024 / ROL_2024 * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(Alunos_F, 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(ROL_F, 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(Forecast_F, 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when ROL_F = 0 or ROL_F is null then null else round(Forecast_F / ROL_F * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(Alunos_R, 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(ROL_R, 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(Resultado_R, 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when ROL_R = 0 or ROL_R is null then null else round(Resultado_R / ROL_R * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  1 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN ('Premium', 'Vanguarda')

UNION ALL

-- Subtotal: Operações Premium - Escolas (soma de Premium + Vanguarda)
SELECT 
  'Operações Premium - Escolas' as Vertical,
  round(sum(Alunos_2024), 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_2024), 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_2024), 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_2024) = 0 or sum(ROL_2024) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_2024) / sum(ROL_2024) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_F), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(ROL_F), 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Forecast_F), 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when sum(ROL_F) = 0 or sum(ROL_F) is null then null else round(sum(Forecast_F) / sum(ROL_F) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_R), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_R), 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_R), 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_R) = 0 or sum(ROL_R) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_R) / sum(ROL_R) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  2 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN ('Premium', 'Vanguarda')

UNION ALL

-- Verticais individuais: MBGS, Maple LATAM, Maple US, Maple Bear Escolas Próprias
SELECT 
  Vertical,
  round(Alunos_2024, 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(ROL_2024, 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(Resultado_2024, 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when ROL_2024 = 0 or ROL_2024 is null then null else round(Resultado_2024 / ROL_2024 * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(Alunos_F, 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(ROL_F, 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(Forecast_F, 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when ROL_F = 0 or ROL_F is null then null else round(Forecast_F / ROL_F * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(Alunos_R, 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(ROL_R, 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(Resultado_R, 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when ROL_R = 0 or ROL_R is null then null else round(Resultado_R / ROL_R * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  3 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN ('MBGS', 'Maple LATAM', 'Maple US', 'Maple Bear Escolas Próprias')

UNION ALL

-- Subtotal: Operações Premium - Franquias (soma das franquias)
SELECT 
  'Operações Premium - Franquias' as Vertical,
  round(sum(Alunos_2024), 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_2024), 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_2024), 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_2024) = 0 or sum(ROL_2024) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_2024) / sum(ROL_2024) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_F), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(ROL_F), 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Forecast_F), 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when sum(ROL_F) = 0 or sum(ROL_F) is null then null else round(sum(Forecast_F) / sum(ROL_F) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_R), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_R), 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_R), 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_R) = 0 or sum(ROL_R) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_R) / sum(ROL_R) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  4 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN ('MBGS', 'Maple LATAM', 'Maple US', 'Maple Bear Escolas Próprias')

UNION ALL

-- Subtotal: Operações Premium (soma de Escolas + Franquias)
SELECT 
  'Operações Premium' as Vertical,
  round(sum(Alunos_2024), 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_2024), 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_2024), 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_2024) = 0 or sum(ROL_2024) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_2024) / sum(ROL_2024) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_F), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(ROL_F), 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Forecast_F), 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when sum(ROL_F) = 0 or sum(ROL_F) is null then null else round(sum(Forecast_F) / sum(ROL_F) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_R), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_R), 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_R), 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_R) = 0 or sum(ROL_R) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_R) / sum(ROL_R) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  5 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN ('Premium', 'Vanguarda', 'MBGS', 'Maple LATAM', 'Maple US', 'Maple Bear Escolas Próprias')

UNION ALL

-- Verticais individuais: Holding, SEB Matriz, Publiseb, CEFIC
SELECT 
  Vertical,
  round(Alunos_2024, 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(ROL_2024, 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(Resultado_2024, 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when ROL_2024 = 0 or ROL_2024 is null then null else round(Resultado_2024 / ROL_2024 * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(Alunos_F, 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(ROL_F, 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(Forecast_F, 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when ROL_F = 0 or ROL_F is null then null else round(Forecast_F / ROL_F * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(Alunos_R, 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(ROL_R, 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(Resultado_R, 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when ROL_R = 0 or ROL_R is null then null else round(Resultado_R / ROL_R * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  6 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN ('Holding', 'SEB Matriz', 'Publiseb', 'CEFIC')

UNION ALL

-- Subtotal: Total Estratégico (soma das verticais estratégicas)
SELECT 
  'Total Estratégico' as Vertical,
  round(sum(Alunos_2024), 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_2024), 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_2024), 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_2024) = 0 or sum(ROL_2024) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_2024) / sum(ROL_2024) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_F), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(ROL_F), 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Forecast_F), 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when sum(ROL_F) = 0 or sum(ROL_F) is null then null else round(sum(Forecast_F) / sum(ROL_F) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_R), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_R), 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_R), 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_R) = 0 or sum(ROL_R) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_R) / sum(ROL_R) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  7 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN ('Holding', 'SEB Matriz', 'Publiseb', 'CEFIC')

UNION ALL

-- Subtotal: Total Op. Premium (soma de tudo)
SELECT 
  'Total Op. Premium' as Vertical,
  round(sum(Alunos_2024), 0) as `Alunos (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_2024), 0) as `ROL (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_2024), 0) as `Resultado (10M24 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_2024) = 0 or sum(ROL_2024) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_2024) / sum(ROL_2024) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M24 R)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_F), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(ROL_F), 0) as `ROL (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Forecast_F), 0) as `Forecast (10M25 F)`,
  case when sum(ROL_F) = 0 or sum(ROL_F) is null then null else round(sum(Forecast_F) / sum(ROL_F) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 F)`,
  round(sum(Alunos_R), 0) as `Alunos (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(ROL_R), 0) as `ROL (10M25 R)`,
  round(sum(Resultado_R), 0) as `Resultado (10M25 R)`,
  case when sum(ROL_R) = 0 or sum(ROL_R) is null then null else round(sum(Resultado_R) / sum(ROL_R) * 100, 1) end as `%Ebtida (10M25 R)`,
  8 as sort_order
FROM base_data
WHERE Vertical IN (
  'Premium', 'Vanguarda', 
  'MBGS', 'Maple LATAM', 'Maple US', 'Maple Bear Escolas Próprias',
  'Holding', 'SEB Matriz', 'Publiseb', 'CEFIC'
)

ORDER BY sort_order, Vertical

categories.name: 🏢 Holding e Estratégico
categories.description: Holding, SEB Matriz, Publiseb e CEFIC
